# 📜 CeloHT Code of Conduct

CeloHT is committed to a safe, inclusive, and respectful community.

## Positive Behavior
- Respectful communication  
- Constructive feedback  
- Inclusive language  
- Collaboration  

## Unacceptable Behavior
- Harassment  
- Discrimination  
- Personal attacks  
- Publishing private information  

## Scope
Applies to all CeloHT repositories, discussions, and community spaces.

## Enforcement
Violations may result in warnings, temporary bans, or permanent removal.

By contributing, you agree to uphold these standards.
